# Portal Landing Page Copy — Layer 1 Operating System

## Hero
Install the AI Operating System for your business.

## Subheadline
Turn your company knowledge, workflows, and judgment into repeatable AI employees — with approval gates, prompt libraries, and operating playbooks built for real business work.

## Primary CTA

## Secondary CTA

## What you get
- KOI Role Builder
- CLEAR Department Prompt Library
- 10-80-10 Delegation Templates
- Golden Triangle AI Strategy Map

## Positioning
This is not a prompt library. It is a business operating layer.
Prompts help you get one answer. An operating system helps your team produce, review, improve, and reuse work every week.

## Member promise
By the end of Layer 1, you will have one AI employee workflow running in draft-only mode, producing a real output your team can review.
